ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_applications" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Package type of the component (e.g., SOT-223, SOT-23A) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "datasheet" TEXT /* Link to the datasheet of the component */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint of the component */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package_type FOREIGN KEY ("package_type") REFERENCES package_types ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pin configuration belongs to */,
  "pin_number" TEXT /* Pin number or numbers (e.g., 1, 2-3) */,
  "pin_function" TEXT /* Function of the pin (e.g., GND, V) */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or requirements for the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., input, output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_pin_function FOREIGN KEY ("pin_function") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the package type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function (e.g., GND, V) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function (e.g., digital, analog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, production staff, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "version_id")
)
